name: Hundsun Technologies Inc.
summary: Hundsun Technologies Inc. operates as a financial technology company in the People's Republic of China. The company offers integrated solutions and services to the institutions of securities, futures, funds, trust, insurance, bank, exchange, and private placement. It also provides wealth management tools to individual investors. The company has a strategic partnership with Finastra Group Holdings Limited to develop and launch Fusion Invest, a portfolio management system. Hundsun Technologies Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
